case_title: REYES TONY HERNANDEZ VS. DAVID MICHAEL ROSKO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, REYES TONY AS TO DEFENDANT ROSKO, DAVID MICHAEL AN INDIVIDUAL DBA STRICTLY  CUSTOMS REMODELING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
